name: 05-chrony-sync
args:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${target_username:+${target_username}@}${target_host} 'which chronyd chrony 2>/dev/null && (cat > /etc/chrony.conf << EOF
pool 192.168.1.31 iburst
driftfile /var/lib/chrony/drift
makestep 1.0 3
rtcsync
keyfile /etc/chrony.keys
leapsectz right/UTC
logdir /var/log/chrony
EOF
systemctl restart chronyd; systemctl enable chronyd) || true'
